stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the text "RNP 1.00" and "ANP 1.36" indicating?

options.a: The text is amber because the navigation performance is out of limits.
options.b: The aircraft navigation performance is better than required.
options.c: The actual navigation performance is permitted to be 35% greater than the RNP.
options.d: The aircraft is 1.36 NM off the track.
